title: Rustic Bengali Paneer Fritters
description: Crispy paneer fritters spiced with oregano and a hint of cumin, served with a tangy yogurt dip.
instructions: Chop paneer into 1 cm cubes and set aside.
In a bowl whisk together flour, semolina, cumin, red chili powder, oregano, and salt.
Fold in the paneer cubes until evenly coated.
Stir in yogurt to form a thick batter; let rest 10 minutes.
Heat oil in a deep skillet over medium heat, test with a small drop of batter which should sizzle.
Drop spoonfuls of the batter into the hot oil, flatten slightly, and fry until golden on both sides.
Use a slotted spoon to transfer fritters to paper towels to drain excess oil.
Serve hot with a side of mint yogurt chutney or tuvar dal.
